games.title: Dagon
games.description: A Defender-style underwater arcade shooter inspired by H.P. Lovecraft's short story Dagon. Defend the Monolith and protect the Deep Ones from abduction in the depths of a Lovecraftian ocean.

games.title: Barrel Bears
games.description: Save the cubs! A Kaboom-inspired video game in which the player rescues bear cubs being tossed out of trees by their mama bear.

games.title: Can't Drive 55
games.description: Can't Drive 55 is a pseudo-3D arcade driving game in which the drives the band while dodging police cruisers at high speed.

games.title: Innsmouth Invaders
games.description: A Lovecraft-themed arcade shooter in which the player defends the shoreline against waves of sea-born horrors Cthulhu himself.

games.title: Mountains Of Madness
games.description: A classic shooter set in HP Lovecraft's Antarctic horror universe in which the player battles Elder Things before blasting into a Shoggoth's ice cave.

games.title: Phantasm: Silver Spheres
games.description: A Donkey Kong-style arcade platformer where Reggie battles dwarves, sentinel spheres, and the Tall Man to rescue Mike from the Morningside Mausoleum.

games.title: Runway Rush
games.description: Get them there on time! A Frogger-inspired arcade game set in a busy airport.

games.title: Sky Snacker
games.description: An in-flight feeding frenzy! A Tapper-inspired arcade game where you serve snacks to impatient passengers.

games.title: Jukebox
games.description: Drop a quarter and pick your track! A retro jukebox experience for the Dosswerks Arcade.
